text:
EXPLANATION: The paper with the cited title and authors is a real, publicly available preprint on arXiv (version 2412.14642v1). Although later versions of the same arXiv entry have a different title ("Speak-to-Structure...") and an expanded author list, the cited version and metadata are correct for the original preprint submission.

LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.14642
FOUND_TITLE: TOMG-Bench: Evaluating LLMs on Text-based Open Molecule Generation
FOUND_AUTHORS: Jiatong Li, Junxian Li, Yunqing Liu, Dongzhan Zhou, Qing Li
FOUND_YEAR: 2024
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
